description: SBI General Insurance is an Indian general insurer offering retail insurance products such as health, motor, travel, home, and cyber insurance, along with claims and policy self-service flows. Its public website focuses on product information and customer operations rather than developer-facing integrations.
summary: sbigeneral.in appears to be a public marketing and customer self-service insurance website with an llms.txt file, but I could not find any documented developer integration surfaces (HTTP APIs, GraphQL, MCP servers, or CLIs) on sbigeneral.in or its subdomains.
